title: Tanguy Zenon
wikitext:
{{Short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography | name = Tanguy Zenon | fullname = Tanguy Zenon | image = | image_size = | birth_date = {{birth date and age|df=yes|2002|5|8}} | birth_place = [[Pyrénées-Orientales]],
Languedoc-Roussillon, France |height = {{convert|1.83|m|ftin|0|order=flip|abbr=on}} | weight = {{convert|86|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|WG|FB}} | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Saint-Estève XIII Catalan]]}} | year1start = 2020 | year1end = 25 | appearances1 = 36 | tries1 = 12 | goals1 = 0 | fieldgoals1 = 0 | points1 = 48 | club2 = [[Catalans Dragons]] | year2start = 2022 | year2end = 25 | appearances2 = 5 | tries2 = 1 | goals2 = 0 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 4 | club3 = {{nowrap|→ [[Hull Kingston Rovers]]}} | year3start = 2023{{small|(loan)}} | year3end = | appearances3 = 3 | tries3 = 1 | goals3 = 0 | fieldgoals3 = 0 | points3 = 4 | club4 = [[Halifax Panthers]] | year4start = 2026 | year4end = | appearances4 = 3 | tries4 = 2 | goals4 = 1 | fieldgoals4 = 0 | points4 = 10 | club5 = {{nowrap|[[Huddersfield Giants]]}} | year5start = 2026 | year5end = present | appearances5 = 4 | tries5 = 1 | goals5 = 5 | fieldgoals5 = 0 | points5 = 14 | teamA = {{rlnt|France}} | yearAstart = 2023 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 2 | triesA = 1 | goalsA = 0 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 4 | source = [https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/tanguy-zenon/summary.html Rugby League Project] | updated = {{date|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}|DMY}} }} '''Tanguy Zenon''' (born 8 May 2002) is a {{rlnt|France}} international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays at {{rlp|fb}} or {{rlp|wg}} for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]]. ==Playing career== ===2022=== In 2022, he made his début for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] against the [[Wigan Warriors]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/62774591|title=Super League: Wigan Warriors 48-4 Catalans Dragons - Warriors claim eight tries to finish second|publisher=BBC|date=2 September 2022|accessdate=3 September 2022}} ===2023=== He made his international début for {{rlnt|France}} on 29 April 2023, in a 64-0 defeat to {{rlnt|England}} at the [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]]. On 17 June 2023, Zenon made his début for [[Hull KR]] in a [[Challenge Cup]] Quarter Final fixture, also going onto score his first try for the Red & Whites in a 28-10 victory over the [[Salford Red Devils]]. ===2025=== On 15 November 2025, it was announced that Zenon had joined the [[Halifax Panthers]] on a one year deal.{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=16 Nov 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Released Super League back lands Championship deal for 2026 as new club revealed|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/tanguy-zenon-joins-halifax-for-2026}} ===2026=== On 18 February 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]], after becoming a free-agent as a direct consequence of [[Halifax Panthers]] falling into administration{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=18 Feb 2026|author=Aaron Bower|title=Huddersfield Giants complete immediate deal for Halifax Panthers star|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-tanguy-zenon-transfer}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-661-zenon-tanguy/ Catalans Dragons profile] {{Huddersfield Giants squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Zenon, Tanguy}} [[Category:2002 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] [[Category:AS Saint Estève players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Halifax Panthers players]] [[Category:Huddersfield Giants players]] [[Category:Hull Kingston Rovers players]] [[Category:Rugby league fullbacks]] [[Category:Rugby league wingers]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Pyrénées-Orientales]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
